responses.question_text: Tell us about a project where you had to debug a difficult problem. What was your approach?
responses.transcript: So the bug only showed up under load. I added logging around the request handler and found a race condition on the shared counter.

responses.question_text: You mentioned adding print statements to debug — how would you approach the same failure if it only happened in production and not locally?
responses.transcript: I would reproduce with production-like load in staging and add structured logging with request IDs before touching the code.

rationale.technical_skill: Explained a load-dependent race condition clearly.
rationale.communication: Natural, specific phrasing; no templated structure detected.
rationale.job_fit: Relevant backend experience for the role.
